title: Implement AutoCloseAncestors
description: New function in internal/graph/. Walks up parent chain after a close, auto-closing ancestors whose Children() are all closed. Continues past already-closed ancestors (don't stop). Skips gate and molecule types. Sets CloseReason to 'Auto-closed: all children completed'. Cycle guard with visited set. Resilient error handling. See GRAPH_AND_CASCADE_DESIGN.md 'Auto-Close Parent' section. Include comprehensive unit tests covering: last child close, multi-level recursion, skip-already-closed-continue-up, gate/molecule skip, Get error mid-chain.
close_reason: Implemented by beads-coder - AutoCloseAncestors with resilient traversal, 5 tests passing
